subject: PR review please — checkout flow refactor
snippet: Could you take a look at #847 today? Blocking the release.
body:
Hey,

Could you take a look at PR #847 today? It's blocking the Friday release.

Thanks!
Sarah

subject: [checkexcel/api] CI failure on main
snippet: Build #2341 failed. 2 tests failing in auth_spec.ts.
body:
GitHub Actions

Workflow: CI / build-and-test
Branch: main
Commit: a3f81b2

Build #2341 failed.
Failing: tests/auth_spec.ts:42 (token refresh), tests/auth_spec.ts:88 (session timeout)

View run: https://github.com/checkexcel/api/actions/runs/2341

subject: Action required: server password expires in 5 days
snippet: Your prod-db-01 SSH password expires Apr 29.
body:
Hello,

Your password for prod-db-01 expires on 29 April 2026 (5 days).

Rotate via: https://ops.mycompany.com/rotate

Failure to rotate will lock you out.

subject: [CheckExcel] Cannot import .xlsx with merged cells
snippet: User Maria reports import fails on merged cells.
body:
From: Maria Tan <maria@acme.com>

Hi team,

I tried to import our Q1 sales sheet into CheckExcel and it errors out with 'cannot parse merged cells'. We use merged cells extensively for headers.

Is there a workaround?

Maria
